channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Truecaller clashes with India’s telecom regulator over anti-spam rules
item.description: The caller ID company says users are increasingly ignoring and blocking calls from India's dedicated business number series.

item.title: How to watch The Five-Star Weekend from anywhere in the world – stream the new Jennifer Garner drama series online
item.description: Jennifer Garner stars in the small screen adaptation of Elin Hilderbrand's novel about grief and friendship – here's how to watch The Five-Star Weekend.

item.title: Peaky Blinders sequel: cast, plot, and everything else we know about Netflix's untitled follow-up series
item.description: Peaky Blinders is getting a sequel series on Netflix. Here's everything we know about the Shelby family's return.
